goal: Register the complete effective G4B-U04 approximation authority and connect the existing 13-KP, 13-PatternGroup and 19-PatternSpec production runtime through the Golden shared adapter without changing source semantics, public controls, layout modes or scenario families.

authorityLineage.producer: S62-S68 source, KnowledgePoint, FormalMapping and PatternSpec authority plus the source-backed R2C discount overlay
authorityLineage.authoritativeState: G4B-U04 KnowledgeOperation registry with thirteen KnowledgePoints, thirteen canonical operation models and nineteen current PatternSpec bindings
